title: Marketplace Manager - Park Avenue - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Park Avenue - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Park Avenue in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Park Avenue:
Park Avenue is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Park Avenue!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
